title: NIRMIRO A6 Pocket Notebook Small Notepad, (3 Pack) Mini Notebook Note pad Pocket Size and Pen Set, 9.4 x 14.5cm Hardback Small Leather Notebook Notepad with 100Gsm Lined Paper, Black
features: 【A6 Pocket Notebook】Each piece contains 3 pocket notepads and 3 pens, Waterproof leather bound journal notebook, strong binding won't crack. These hardback mini small lined notebooks journal for men women work organization travel school writing . There's a "date/page/weather/week" column on the top of every page.

【Small Notebook Function】1. Small notepad with elastic pen holder loop, double stitching will not fall off; 2. Elastic Closure attached to back cover keeps note pad closed; 3. Two bookmark ribbons can mark the position of your writing.

【Pocket Size Notebook】9.4 x 14.5cm mini pocket note book journal college ruled, can be used as a notepad, note pads, travel notebook journal, password notebook, diary journal, note taking can be kept in your shirt and trouser pocket, wallet, and record at any time.

【Lined Thick Paper】The small notebook is made of 100gsm ivory thick paper, the paper is smooth, the writing is smooth, and the ink will not bleed. Each note book has 136 pages (68 sheets), a total of 408 pages, ruled pages.

【Application & After-sales】These A6 small notebooks are perfect for women and men to record life at work home school travel, as a diary, note book, notepad, note pads. Also record grocery lists, to-do list, moods, and more. If you receive the pocket notebook is damaged or have any problems in the process, please contact us, we will be the first time for you to solve all your problems!
